name: Flowermate Cap
summary: A small, affordable conduction dry-herb vaporiser with three temperature presets, for patients who want a simple discreet device on a budget.
description: The Flowermate Cap keeps things deliberately simple: three preset temperatures (196, 204 and 216C) selected with a single button, plus haptic feedback so you know when it's ready. The stainless steel chamber holds 0.3g for single-person dosing, and the aluminium body is genuinely pocket-sized at 90g. Expect 8-10 sessions per charge. For a UK patient who wants a no-fuss, low-cost device and doesn't need fine temperature control, the Cap covers the basics well — just note the smaller battery and conduction heating mean shorter runtime and a slower draw. One-year warranty.
